title: 有馬記念の後に・このキングにして

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo takes first place in a spectacular
victory to end the year and solidify her position
as the star of her generation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before her winning concert begins, she
receives a call from her mother. This time, King
Halo is calm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells her mother that she'll surpass her,
declaring that one day her legacy will simply
become "King Halo's mother" instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo leaves her phone with me and runs off
to perform the concert. After listening to both of
them speak, I realize how they're both similarly
awkward.
